code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    mut idx = 0
    mut out = ""
    mut cur = ""
    mut in_tok = false
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
          if in_tok
            if idx % 2 == 0
              if string.is_empty(out)
                out = cur
              else
                out = "#{out} #{cur}"
              end
            end
            idx = idx + 1
            cur = ""
            in_tok = false
          end
        else
          cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
          in_tok = true
        end
      when None
        in_tok = in_tok
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if in_tok
      if idx % 2 == 0
        if string.is_empty(out)
          out = cur
        else
          out = "#{out} #{cur}"
        end
      end
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
